templates.name: Rewards Loyalty/Birthday Gift
templates.content: Sure! Please review our Hooked Rewards program as we absolutely do offer a loyalty program that includes free shipping and a birthday gift: https://www.thirdlove.com/pages/rewards

templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://www.thirdlove.com/pages/bra-size-chart

templates.name: How do I update my account name?
templates.content: To change your name, please reach out to our team at hello@thirdlove.com. They'll be more than happy to help out!

templates.name: The free shipping minimum is too much / not affordable / too expensive
templates.content: I understand, please reach out to our customer service department by chatting via our website ( https://www.thirdlove.com/ ) or emailing hello@thirdlove.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: I have motion issues / I can't move my shoulders and wrists to close the clasp at the back
templates.content: We just released our Slick Chicks Adaptive Lounge Bra which would be perfect for people who need front closures. Check it out here: https://www.thirdlove.com/products/slick-chicks-adaptive-lounge-bra-with-velcro-brand-fastener

templates.name: I used my return credit at checkout and my order total is above $100. I'm still being charged for shipping.
templates.content: I'm really sorry to hear that. Using the credit on a new order doesn't affect free shipping. Can I please have your email address so I can check on this with my team for you?

templates.name: Material for the Everyday Cotton Underwear
templates.content: Our Everyday Cotton Underwear is made up of 95% Cotton, and 5% Spandex.

templates.name: Are your bras ethical to buy? fair trade?
templates.content: While we don't currently work with any factories that are fair trade certified, we do employ third-party, expert firms that are trained to assess factory working conditions. These assessments let us know that the factories we work with treat workers with respect and adhere to local and international labor laws. We are also proud to work with factories that are focused on sustainability, the environment, and their factory conditions. Our facilities are eco-certified, they recycle, and they pass all oeko-tex standards.

templates.name: What different seams do you have on your panties / underwear?
templates.content: We have 3 types. Piped - where a separate type of material is attached to the edge of the main underwear material. Flat - which is folded over with no stitching holding them in place, and Rolled - which is folded over and stitched, similar to the hem on a pair of pants.

templates.name: Can't print a return label
templates.content: You can also download it to your phone and take it to a FedEx location near you, and they can print it for you. You can find a location hear you here - https://local.fedex.com/

templates.name: Checkout issues for bundle items
templates.content: To successfully checkout with a bundle, please select a color for each option. When it's selected, you'll see a black outline indicating your selection. Here's a screenshot for reference: https://prnt.sc/fAm5tNiX27bd

templates.name: Do you have a referral program?
templates.content:
Yes, we do! You can refer a friend and you'll both get $25 by following these steps:

1. Go to our website here: https://www.thirdlove.com/ 
2. Click on "Get $25" on the right side of the screen and enter the email address you want to earn rewards with. 
3. Wait for it to generate a custom URL for you. 
4. Copy the URL and share with your friends!

templates.name: Which style does NOT have a ballet U back?
templates.content: Our 24/7 lace contour plunge bra does not have a ballet-u back for now.

templates.name: Follow up for athletic breast shape
templates.content: Alright! Cup gaping tends to be a common issue for athletic shapes due to the lack of volume up top. You should explore t-shirt styles, like our 24/7 classic t-shirt bra, which will help lift your breasts comfortably.  Check it here: https://www.thirdlove.com/products/24-7-classic-t-shirt-bra-taupe

templates.name: What's the meaning behind the name 'Third Love'?
templates.content: When a woman truly loves an item of clothing, it's because it hits all three points: style, fit and feel (comfort). We strive to do that with each and every bra, which is why we named the company ThirdLove.

templates.name: Post Purchase Follow Up 1
templates.content: Can you please confirm the name, phone number, and email that is under?

templates.name: Coverage types we offer
templates.content: Our perfect coverage styles offer the most coverage, followed by our demi styles with moderate coverage and finishing up with our plunge styles which feature a low cut gore for more cleavage, therefore, having the least amount of coverage.

templates.name: How do I find my fit?
templates.content: That's what we're here for! Our Fitting Room will ask you questions to determine your perfect fit, and if you're still unsure let me know and we'll look together : ) - https://www.thirdlove.com/pages/fitting-room

templates.name: Can I work for Third Love?
templates.content: You can definitely apply to work with us! Check this out - https://careers.thirdlove.com/

templates.name: How long do I have to return the items once I initiate a return?
templates.content: You have 2 weeks to return the originals, and it doesn't matter at what point you're in for the 60 day return policy, it has to be within 2 weeks once initiated.

templates.name: What does a seamless style of panties / underwear mean?
templates.content: A "seamless" style refers to whether or not the edges of the underwear style can be seen through clothes. You might have heard of V.P.L. (Visible panty line) which is what most people call them. Thong styles will nearly always be considered a "seamless" fit, while many other styles (especially those featuring piped seams and edges) will not be.

templates.name: What type of wires do you use? What metal do you use?
templates.content: We use flexible nylon-coated, nickel-free wires (with the exception of our wireless options). Our wires are made of lightweight steel and are dipped in enamel. Our wires and alloy hardware (ring, sliders, charms) do not contain copper or zinc either, but we do make our bras in a shared facility that produces other brands. We cannot guarantee whether these other brands use this type of material.

templates.name: What is the no slip lining on the strapless bra?
templates.content: The no-slip lining on the strapless is silicone.

templates.name: What is a ballet back?
templates.content: This is the shape that's created where the straps meet the band on the hook and eye closure which allows the straps to sit narrower on the shoulders, and prevents them from slipping off of the shoulders.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/thirdlove/ and Facebook here: https://www.facebook.com/thirdlove

templates.name: Payment options
templates.content: We offer financing through afterpay, and we also offer paypal, card payments and amazon pay! :)

templates.name: Follow up for side set breast shapes
templates.content: Similar to east-west shapes, side sets tend to have a center gap, but fuller-shaped breasts with nipples that face more forward. You should explore uplift plunge styles, which are made to naturally lift and draw your breasts closer together. Check them out here: https://www.thirdlove.com/collections/uplift-plunge

templates.name: How many hooks does the nursing bras have? Bra with most hooks?
templates.content: The nursing bra is the only style we carry that features extended hooks which means the bra has 5 hook and eye closures along the band of the bra for more adjustability.

templates.name: What coverage and bands do Plunge cups have?
templates.content: The plunge bras have a low cut gore for more cleavage, so the fabric overlay hugs the breast tissue, eliminating cup gaping and overflow. It's very uplifting with removable pads for more/less coverage. It has a smoothing effect under any top. The bands are single layer with soft plush elastic, and it is very comfy and supportive.

templates.name: Are your cups sized with or without the insert inserted?
templates.content: The cups are sized with the inserts included. Removing them makes the cup size larger, roughly 1/2 cup!

templates.name: How wide is the band on the back? (customer asking for measurements)
templates.content: Our measurements do vary based on size, but our plunges will have the narrowest band, going then to our demi/t-shirts and then our full/perfect coverage for widest band and cup coverage.

templates.name: What features and benefits do perfect coverage bras have?
templates.content: They have the perfect amount of coverage, ultra-thin hybrid memory foam as well as wider and shorter straps.

templates.name: What are multi way straps?
templates.content: Multi-way straps can cross in the back where the straps meet the band which prevents the straps from slipping off the shoulders, creating a racerback effect.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: Sure thing, you can start your return here: https://returns.thirdlove.com/

templates.name: What height options do you have for panties / underwear?
templates.content: We have low-rise undies that will hit at (or just below) the natural hip. Our mid-rise should hit just below the belly button and above the natural hip, and depending on your height, high rise should hit at the natural waistline.

templates.name: Can I return your gift cards?
templates.content: Gift cards are final sale and there are no returns or exchanges for them.

templates.name: Customer won't buy because of Pride month ads
templates.content: We pride ourselves on being an inclusive brand,  and we believe that everyone deserves to express themselves authentically and feel comfortable in the skin they're in. While we hate to lose you as a customer, we understand if you would prefer to not shop with us again and we appreciate the time that you've taken on finding your best fit journey with us.

templates.name: What are fully adjustable straps?
templates.content: Fully adjustable straps have the capability to adjust all the way from where the straps meet the cups, to where the straps meet with the band without anything blocking the slider. Things that could block the slider would be the ring in the strap, the accordion straps, and/or the mesh on the plunge styles.

templates.name: Does the nursing bra stretch?
templates.content: Women can fluctuate between 1 to 4 cup sizes while nursing, so our nursing bra cups are designed to stretch to help accommodate fluctuation. The most common rule of thumb when it comes to determining your size is to buy a bra at least 1-2 full cup sizes larger (depending on the volume growth) and one band size larger than your pre-pregnancy bra size and increase the sizing from there if necessary.

templates.name: What coverage and bands do Perfect coverage cups have?
templates.content: They are between full coverage and demi, so they have a flattering sweetheart neck shape. The wide band provides the most coverage and a smooth silhouette which makes it comfy and supportive for everyday wear. It has a ballet u-back that pulls the straps together and prevents slipping.

templates.name: What is your breast shape?
templates.content: What would you say your breast shape is? Here are some references - https://blog.thirdlove.com/breast-shape-dictionary/

templates.name: How do cups and the band feel?
templates.content: How do the cups fit? Are they gaping, spilling or are they just right?  How does the band fit on the loosest hook? Does it feel loose, tight, or just right?

templates.name: How do I measure my bra size? (if customer insists on measuring)
templates.content: Please measure yourself while wearing a lightly-lined bra because this ensures you get the most accurate measurements. Using a soft tape measure, measure your underbust (the area just under your breasts). Make sure the tape is parallel with the ground, and you've exhaled to get the smallest measurement. After you have your underbust, stand straight with your arms at your side and then measure at the fullest part of your bust, usually where the nipple is (while wearing a non-padded bra if possible). This is your overbust measurement.

templates.name: New customer needs help with bra sizing
templates.content: I'd love to get you in a bra that feels great!  Could you answer a few questions? 1. What size do you currently wear? 2. How does the band feel on the bra you currently wear? 3. How do the cups feel on the bra you currently wear? 4. Do you experience any issues with the straps?

templates.name: What are your cups made out of?
templates.content: They are memory foam cups (with the exception of our unlined options).

templates.name: Material composition of the WonderKnit Pajama Jogger
templates.content: Our WonderKnit Pajama Jogger is made up of 57% Cotton, 38% Modal, and 5% Spandex.

templates.name: Do I send my return to USPS or UPS?
templates.content: Our return labels are valid at both USPS and UPS.

templates.name: I'm looking for something that can help with boob sweat!
templates.content: We actually put together a great article about this which you can check out here: https://blog.thirdlove.com/8-ways-to-prevent-breast-sweat/

templates.name: How can I delete my ThirdLove account?
templates.content: If at any point you wish for ThirdLove to delete all information about you, please submit your request to datadeletion@thirdlove.com. To comply with your request, we may ask you to verify your identity, which includes providing us with a physical mailing address.

templates.name: Is there a way I can donate my old bras to charity?
templates.content: Absolutely! We put together a great list with plenty of useful info in a post which you can check out here: https://blog.thirdlove.com/your-old-bras-can-make-a-difference-see-where-to-donate-them/

templates.name: Are the pads in the Kinetic Impact Sports Bra removable?
templates.content: The pads in the Kinetic Impact Sports Bra are not removable.

templates.name: Do you use American or European bra sizing?
templates.content: We use American bra sizing across our entire collection.

templates.name: Does the Lace Back Cheeky have elastic in the leg openings?
templates.content: The Lace Back Cheeky has some elastic in the leg openings, but just enough to keep it secure. It doesn't make the style feel tight in the legs at all.

templates.name: Does removing the inserts in your plunge bras make them unlined?
templates.content: Removing the insert in our Plunge Bras does not make it an unlined style. However, you can check out the unlined options in our collection here: https://www.thirdlove.com/collections/unlined

templates.name: Do you have any strapless styles without the silicone lining? / Silicone allergy
templates.content: We don't have any strapless styles without the silicone lining, though it's a suggestion I'll be sure to pass along to our product team to consider in the future!

templates.name: I don't want USPS to ship my order.
templates.content: If you don't want USPS to ship your order, you would need to order with 2-day or 1-day shipping to ensure it doesn't get handed off to USPS.

templates.name: Are your bikinis and hipsters tag-less? (don't confuse this with price tag)
templates.content: Lace styles will have satin tags, and non-lace styles will have printed-on tags.

templates.name: I need to make an exchange a second time, is that possible?
templates.content: If you need to exchange your order a second time, click here https://returns.thirdlove.com/ to set up a free return for a refund which you can use to place a new order for the new size or style.

templates.name: I've already completed my purchase/order, can I add my discount retroactively?
templates.content: I'll be glad to check and see what we might be able to do. Can you please confirm the name, phone number, and email that is under?

templates.name: I used my (payment method) to complete my order. Where will I see my refund?
templates.content: Refunds are always issued to the original form of payment.

templates.name: Do you offer any alternatives to your discontinued Minimizers?
templates.content: We do not have any Minimizing styles at this time, though I'll definitely pass this along to the team to consider in the future. Thank you for the feedback!

templates.name: Can I try one underwear from a kit and return the rest?
templates.content: You can try one to see if it's the perfect size for you. If it isn't, you can return the rest as long as they're unworn, and the tags are still attached.

templates.name: Why are you adding to the band measurement I gave you? Wouldn't that make your suggestion too big?
templates.content: We add to the measurement as the bands measure smaller when laid flat on a table versus when the band is on the body. Because of this, 2" or 3" are added to overcome the difference between when the elastic in the band is stretched or relaxed.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at hello@thirdlove.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Issues with digging underwires
templates.content: If your underwire is causing you discomfort, this could be for a couple of different reasons. If you're also experiencing gaping or extra room in the cups, you may want to try a smaller cup size. If you aren't experiencing gaping and the band is comfortable, I'd recommend a style with a shorter underwire, such as a plunge. If the underwire causes discomfort on your ribcage, you may need to go up in the band size.

templates.name: Material for closures(hook and eye)
templates.content: The hook and eye hardware for our wired bras is made of a gold alloy. For our wireless bras, the hook and eye closures are enamel coated.

templates.name: Are the bralettes lined?
templates.content: Some of our bralettes are lined. Mostly our lace bralettes are unlined!

templates.name: Difference in Memory foam cups (Classic T-shirt vs Pima)
templates.content: The memory foam cups are the same in both styles, but the Pima Cotton T-Shirt bra has a cotton overlay covering the cups, which can make them seem slightly thicker.

templates.name: My straps keep sliding/slipping down my shoulders
templates.content: If you've already tried tightening the straps, you may be experiencing some gaping in the cups. This can cause your straps to slip. If you notice space between your body and the top of your bra cups, you may want to try a smaller cup size. Also, straps can stretch over time, so if you've had your bra for a while it may be time for a replacement. Additionally, we actually put together a great article with more details about this which you can check out here: https://blog.thirdlove.com/ask-a-fit-specialist-my-straps-won-t-stop-slipping-help/

templates.name: Plunge bras
templates.content: We have a great selection of plunge bras that we update often! You can see them here: https://www.thirdlove.com/collections/plunge

templates.name: Where are the products made and shipped from?
templates.content: We ship from our warehouses in Canada and Indiana. Our products are manufactured in China and Vietnam.

templates.name: Follow up for relaxed breast shapes
templates.content: I would definitely try a balconette style, which has a slightly shorter cup for more fullness at the top. Check it out here: https://www.thirdlove.com/collections/balconette

templates.name: Follow up for tear drop shapes
templates.content: You may experience cup gaping with full-coverage bras, so for more fullness up top, try a balconette style like this one: https://www.thirdlove.com/collections/balconette

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our shipping within the US normally takes 3-10 business days and about 2 weeks to Alaska and Hawaii. Shipping to Canada can take up to 2-3 weeks, but is normally within 7-10 business days.

templates.name: How can I check the status of my return?
templates.content: To check the status of your return, be sure to check your email for a confirmation that your return or exchange has been processed. From there, you can click the portion of the email that states "View your return". This will direct you to the Returns Center where you can check on the status of your return.

templates.name: Demi strapless / multi-way styles
templates.content: The demi styles that are considered strapless/multi-way are the 24/7 Classic Strapless Bra, our 24/7 Classic Lace Strapless Bra, the Lace Balconette Bra, and the Pima Cotton T-Shirt Bra.

templates.name: When is my exchange sent out once I initiate it?
templates.content: The exchange is sent out once your return is in transit, unless you choose to do an instant exchange. An instant exchange would place a hold on your card until your original items are returned.

templates.name: Customer not seeing afterpay as a payment option
templates.content: You may be signed into ShopPay, which doesn't offer Afterpay as a payment method. If that isn't the issue, you may need to contact Afterpay about your account.

templates.name: I received damaged underwear! (warranty)
templates.content: Sorry about that. Can you please confirm the name, phone number, and email your order is under?

templates.name: Who would you recommend perfect coverage bras for? What breast types?
templates.content: This perfect coverage style is great for all breast shapes, but especially for fuller shapes such as bell shapes, round, relaxed, slender, and teardrop.

templates.name: What coverage and bands do Demi cups have?
templates.content: Demi bras have moderate coverage, which means they cover the breasts, but do not sit high on the chest. A demi shape is a little lower at the center but not plunging, and it comes with a single-layer band with soft plush elastic. It is soft, smoothing, comfortable and supportive.

templates.name: Who would you recommend plunge bras to? What breast types?
templates.content: The plunge bras are great for all breast shapes, but we can especially provide recommendations for asymmetric, athletic, bell-shaped, east-west, slender, relaxed, side set, and teardrop shapes.

templates.name: What is your best selling bra / which bra would you recommend?
templates.content: Our 24/7 classic t-shirt bra is our best-seller, and it's a good style for every breast shape, providing moderate coverage.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://www.thirdlove.com/pages/discounts

templates.name: Does your 24/7 Classic T-shirt Bra have padding with a push up?
templates.content: Our 24/7 classic t-shirt bra is not additionally padded or considered a push-up bra. This style comes with ultra-thin memory foam cups which form to your body.

templates.name: What coverage options do you have? (panties , panty , underwear)
templates.content: We have no coverage panties which would be a thong, minimal coverage - which is cheeky, moderate coverage - which is a bikini, substantial coverage - which is hipster, full coverage - which is high brief, and max coverage - which is a boyshort.

templates.name: Damaged bra  - esc when you get their details (warranty) DO NOT ASK FOR PICTURES OF UNDERWEAR
templates.content: Oh no! Sorry about that, could you provide photos of the bra laid out flat on a table? Please ensure the photos are clear and of the entire bra - the more photos the better! Additionally, could you provide details as to how you washed, stored, and cared for the bra? Did you hand-wash it, place it in the washing machine on the delicate cycle, hung it up?

templates.name: What if I'm allergic to a certain material?
templates.content: Our bras are made from high-quality nylon/spandex fabrics sourced from the US, Europe, and Asia. If you are sensitive to nylon, spandex, or polyester we do suggest that you keep this in mind before placing an order. Our products do not contain latex, formaldehyde, flame retardants, nickel, carmine, red dye, copper, or zinc but we do make our bras in a shared facility that produces other brands. I'm afraid we cannot guarantee whether these other brands use this type of material.

templates.name: Customer's band (30, 46, 48) no longer available. (NOTE: You need to edit the template relative to the band they need that's unavailable)
templates.content: We are out of stock and no longer replenishing (UNAVAILABLEBANDSIZE) and instead, our Design Team is continuing to work on optimizing the perfect product in this size. We understand how frustrating this must be and will be sharing your feedback with our Design and Marketing Teams. I suggest signing up for our newsletter at the bottom of our homepage to ensure you stay up to date on the latest news and drops! In the meantime, we understand fit is tricky, which is why we're here to help! We recommend trying some of our supportive wireless styles which you can check out here: https://www.thirdlove.com/collections/wireless-1

templates.name: Will the price appear on the packaging?
templates.content: No, our packaging doesn't list prices.

templates.name: Can I process a return online for a purchase I made in-store?
templates.content: Please note that in-store purchases can only be returned to the store you purchased the items from.

templates.name: Percentage of cotton for pima cotton hipster
templates.content: It's 43% Pima Cotton, 33% Nylon, 24% Spandex, and the gusset is 100% Cotton.

templates.name: The item I want to return/exchange is not showing up
templates.content: Our Returns and Exchange Form will only show items that are currently in stock and have enough in stock to be able to send out. If you're not seeing the item you want on this form this is likely why. We apologize for any inconvenience that this may cause you and I'd be happy to help you with finding another style or shade you'd like.

templates.name: Follow up for east-west breast shapes
templates.content: Just as its name suggests, east-west shapes are characterized by wide-set breasts that gravitate away from the chest center. You may find that it's more difficult to achieve cleavage with certain tops, I know I do! You should look for full coverage bras to help bring your breasts up and together. Check them out here: https://www.thirdlove.com/collections/full-coverage-bras

templates.name: Why are your bras so expensive? Product too expensive
templates.content: The price of our bras reflects the quality of the design, incredibly comfortable materials, and one-of a-kind-fit. Returns and exchanges are always free for U.S. orders, and with our perfect fit promise, you have 60 days to wash it and wear it. If you don't love it, you can send it back!

templates.name: How long does a bra last?
templates.content: We recommend replacing bras every six months to a year, depending on how many bras you own and how often you wear them.

templates.name: Post Purchase Follow Up 2
templates.content: Thank you, I just passed along all your information to our fit stylist and I let them know what the issue is. Please hang tight, someone will reach out to you via email or text within 24-48 hours.

templates.name: Underwear return and exchange policy
templates.content: Please note that underwear should be unworn and in the original, unopened polybag in order to qualify for exchanges or returns. You can check our underwear return and exchange policy here: https://help.thirdlove.com/en_us/underwear-return-and-exchange-policy-ryy_gV8F8

templates.name: How do I know my bra fits well?
templates.content: A new bra should feel snug, but not uncomfortable, on the loosest set of hooks.

templates.name: Why is my exchange not free?
templates.content: You get free shipping when you exchange for the same style but different size or color. If you're exchanging for a different style, it's considered a return and you'll be refunded the amount of your original order which you can then use to purchase the new item.

templates.name: How do I wash and care for your bras?
templates.content: Great question! We recommend hand washing all of our bras and laying them flat to dry. You can find detailed care instructions here: https://blog.thirdlove.com/lingerie-care/

templates.name: What should I get for asymmetry?
templates.content: We have a few styles that work for asymmetry which you can check out here - https://www.thirdlove.com/collections/asymmetric  We suggest sizing for the larger breast and using a silicone insert for the cup with the smaller breast.

templates.name: International return policy
templates.content: You can take a look at our international return policy here: https://help.thirdlove.com/en_us/what-is-the-exchange-and-return-policy-for-international-orders--r1FxxGx_r

templates.name: Which of your styles has removable inserts?
templates.content: Our plunge bra styles feature removable inserts which are great for more/less volume, as well as asymmetric shapes.

templates.name: What is your exchange and return policy? US only BRAS
templates.content: We offer a great return/exchange policy for our US customers, where you can return for a full refund regardless if worn, within 60 days. Please keep original tags on the products. You can also check out our return policy in detail here - https://help.thirdlove.com/en_us/what-is-your-exchange-and-return-policy-SJeXKVSS

templates.name: What do you do with returned products?
templates.content: We donate it! All gently worn bras are donated to individuals in need. We work with several different charities, such as 'I Support the Girls', who support women's health and dignity all over the world.

templates.name: Follow up for bell breast shapes
templates.content: People with Bell-shaped breast types can tend to experience gaping at the top of the cup, even when filling out the bottom of the cup. You can sometimes alleviate this slight gaping by tightening the straps of the bra. You may want to explore bras with full coverage which feature wider, memory foam straps that provide support, but never dig in. We have many styles for bell-shaped breast types which you can view, here: https://www.thirdlove.com/collections/bell-shape

templates.name: What are the features and benefits of plunge bra styles?
templates.content: It is available in 1/2 cup sizes and it's a versatile style that can be worn under V-neck & button-down shirts. It has a low-cut gore for more cleavage and a wider angled underwire. Its straps are center set, pulling them closer to the center of the body. They are also great for people with asymmetry, with removable pads that add a half-cup and an overlay that alleviates gaping.

templates.name: Follow up for asymmetric breast shape
templates.content: Got it! 40 percent of women have breasts that differ in size, including me! Keep in mind it ranges from slight asymmetry to an entire cup size difference. You should explore bras with removable inserts, like many of our plunge bras! You can check them out here: https://www.thirdlove.com/collections/plunge

templates.name: Bras for mastectomies
templates.content: We've partnered with Ana Ono to bring you comfortable, supportive, and cute post-surgery bras that work for your body. You can view them, here: https://www.thirdlove.com/collections/post-surgery-bras

templates.name: Will you refund duties and taxes for international orders?
templates.content: Taxes are refunded. The amount not refunded is the original shipping fee plus the $13 CAD return shipping fee. We now cover the cost of Duties!

templates.name: Follow up for round breast shapes
templates.content: Most styles will work well for your shape, but you can try a wireless bra for days when you only want light support or a balconette style when you want an ultra-flattering fit. Check them out here: https://www.thirdlove.com/collections/wireless-1 and https://www.thirdlove.com/collections/balconette

templates.name: Follow up for slender breast shapes
templates.content: Many of our styles will work well with slender breast shapes! If you're looking to create some cleavage, you can try uplift plunge bras for a flattering lift. Check them out here: https://www.thirdlove.com/collections/plunge

templates.name: Store locations/retailer
templates.content: You can find a store near you here: https://www.thirdlove.com/pages/stores

templates.name: Canada shipping too expensive
templates.content: Thanks for the feedback! We are constantly working on improving our processes so definitely keep an eye out. Please note if you are interested in ordering from us in the future we offer free shipping for orders over $150 CAD. Let me know if you have any additional questions, I am always happy to help!

templates.name: Organic scoop bralette material
templates.content: The Organic Scoop Bralette is made up of 93% Organic Cotton, and 7% elastane jersey.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorships
templates.content: The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at partnerships@thirdlove.com. Our team is happy to chat!

templates.name: Cost of duty (Canada)
templates.content: For Canada, taxes are charged at checkout.

templates.name: Cost of duty
templates.content: We want every woman to feel their best, and realize that the cost of duties might get in the way of that. So we now cover the cost of duties for orders to Canada!

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at partnerships@thirdlove.com. Our team is happy to chat!

templates.name: I can't afford your products/Are you running any sales?
templates.content: You can view any sale items in the SALE section which you can find at the top of our site! We also have our Bundle and Save discount which we offer to all customers. The more bras you buy, the more you save! The discount is applied in your cart. If you'd like to learn more about Bundle and Save, you can find the details here! https://help.thirdlove.com/en_us/bundle-and-save-Syq9qbuB

templates.name: When will I receive my refund?
templates.content: Most orders will be refunded once they're delivered to our warehouse. Return shipping can take 10 business days from the time you drop off your return.

templates.name: Do you have push-up bras?
templates.content: We don't have push-up bras specifically, but if you're looking for something that adds extra volume or lift, we would suggest checking out our styles with removable padded inserts like the 24/7 Classic Uplift Plunge Bra ( https://www.thirdlove.com/products/24-7-classic-contour-plunge-bra-taupe ) and Lace Contour Plunge Bra ( https://www.thirdlove.com/products/24-7-lace-contour-plunge-bra-black ).

templates.name: I can't drive to the post office to drop my return package
templates.content: Please note that you can set up a pickup with USPS for your return. You just have to schedule the pickup and leave it with your mail person with the return label attached!

templates.name: Cancel/edit order
templates.content: You may request to change or cancel your order within one hour of placing the order if it's placed within our business hours of 8 am - 7 pm PT, 7 days a week. Please chat or text with us via the website, or email us at hello@thirdlove.com. Here is a link to our cancel/change help center as well: https://help.thirdlove.com/en_us/how-do-i-change-or-cancel-an-order-ryKSspCBB

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but you can reach out to our Customer Experience Team via live chat, email at hello@thirdlove.com, or text 7 days a week from 8am to 7pm PST at ThirdLove.com and (415) 692-0089 for text and a Fit Stylist can schedule a call back with you.

templates.name: You don't offer my size! - ESC after
templates.content: I'm sorry to hear that! I'll be happy to pass this along to our Design Team. Can you please tell me your size?

templates.name: How do I get the referral code to work?
templates.content: For the person being referred, they can only get $25 off of their first purchase. If it's not their first purchase, the referral will not work and neither party gets $25 off.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content:
We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $100 and on orders to Canada over $150. You can also get free shipping on domestic orders over $75 if you sign up for a Hooked Rewards account here: https://www.thirdlove.com/account/register
Are you interested in adding anything to reach the minimum for free shipping, maybe some undies?

templates.name: Can I order through the phone?
templates.content: We do have Fit Stylists available to help place an order over the phone. You may email us at hello@thirdlove.com, chat with our team via our website or text us at (415)692-0089 (during our live support hours 8:00 am to 7:00 pm PT) and request a callback. If you want, I can also check on my end if we can schedule one for you. Please provide me with the best phone number to reach you at and when you're available!

templates.name: Follow Up 3
templates.content: You can also contact our Customer Experience Team directly, they're available for live chat and text 7 days a week from 8am to 7pm PST at ThirdLove.com and (415) 692-0089 for text.

templates.name: Can I schedule a phone call?/ Customer is requesting a callback
templates.content: I'm afraid that we no longer offer to schedule a phone call.

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.thirdlove.com/collections/sale
